name: F-Secure File Infection Detected
description: Detects file infections reported by F-Secure Gatekeeper. This indicates that malware has been detected.

prompts.prompt: High-severity F-Secure Gatekeeper alert: A file infection has been detected, indicating active malware presence. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Event Type** {event_type}, **File Path** {file_path}, **File Name** {file_name}, **Threat Name** {threat_name}, **Action Taken** {action}, **User** {user}. Investigate this critical infection immediately to contain the threat and ensure system integrity.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the file infection detection.

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: The type of event reported by F-Secure (e.g., 'Threat detected').

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: The full path to the infected file.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the infected file.

parameters.name: threat_name
parameters.description: The name of the detected malware or threat.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user associated with the infected file or system.
